tools_page.title: Tools Ecosystem
tools_page.subtitle: Power your creative flow with our integrated acoustic engineering and music theory utilities.
tools_page.tuner_desc: High-precision chromatic tuner for guitar, bass, ukulele, and violin with real-time YIN detection via AudioWorklets and dynamic noise calibration.
tools_page.voice_desc: Analytical vocal scoring (Singer Score), auto-key matcher, and live polyphonic harmony training.
tools_page.hum_desc: Hum a vocal melody and Artificial Intelligence will write the base chord structure directly into the editor.
